spatial_rules.primary_strategy: calm symmetrical moments in key rooms with practical modern circulation
spatial_rules.ventilation: use shutters, high openings, and shaded balconies conceptually
spatial_rules.privacy: soft screen layers and recessed openings
spatial_rules.lot_fit: fits apartments and townhouses when the heritage-inspired moments stay light and do not crowd circulation
spatial_rules.section_idea: show feature arch/screen zones only where they explain a real room relationship

opening_rules.door_style: timber tone with simple panel rhythm
opening_rules.window_style: rectangular or softly arched concept openings with shutters/screens
opening_rules.default_opening_strategy: use rhythmic, shaded openings and keep arches/screens as selective concept accents
opening_rules.avoid: heavy ornate detailing at concept scale

default_rules.homeowner_question_policy: do not ask for technical dimensions by default; expose them as style assumptions

facade_intent: Warm, crafted, restrained facade or interior frontage with soft rhythm, cream base tones, and selective timber/rattan-inspired accents.

facade_rules.massing: simple volume with soft rhythm and shaded balcony
facade_rules.greenery: small planted accents rather than dense tropical cover
facade_rules.rhythm: soft symmetrical bays with selective arch or shutter moments
facade_rules.opening_language: rectangular windows can be softened with arch/shutter/screen cues rather than ornate detail
facade_rules.shading: deep reveals, shutters, and rattan/wood-inspired screens used as concept marks

facade_expression.rhythm: Soft vertical rhythm with one or two symmetrical moments, selective arches, and crafted screen/shutter bays.
facade_expression.opening_language: Moderate openings; use a light arch, shutter, or screen cue only where it explains the style.
facade_expression.shading_language: Deep reveals, timber/rattan-inspired screens, and small balcony shade elements.
facade_expression.material_zone_language: Cream base, dark timber/rattan accents, pattern-tile base band, and warm metal hints.
facade_expression.client_explanation: Indochine mềm dùng nhịp mặt đứng ấm và có thủ công, nhưng chi tiết vòm/mây/gạch chỉ là điểm nhấn concept để tránh nặng nề.

material_assumptions: Palette is concept intent from the indochine_soft style profile and must be confirmed as real products later.
Timber, rattan, pattern tile, and brass-tone cues are visual direction only, not a final material specification.
Arches/screens are simplified concept marks and should not be read as measured fabrication details.

plan_notes: show feature arch/screen zones only where spatially relevant
elevation_notes: label material concept without detailed fabrication
drawing_rules.line_emphasis: feature openings and screen zones should be legible but not overdrawn

drawing_notes: Use feature arch/screen labels sparingly and only where tied to a room.
For apartments, note fixed wet/core assumptions instead of moving them silently.
Keep decorative motifs simplified at concept scale.
avoid_rules: moving apartment wet areas without verified constraints

large_glass.replacement: moderate openings with shutter/screen rhythm and warmer solid surfaces
large_glass.note: Suppress glass-heavy expression and use shutters/screens to keep the facade warm and private.
large_glass.drawing_note: Giảm kính theo dislike: dùng cửa vừa phải với shutter/màn mây-gỗ và mảng tường kem.

dark_closed_interior.replacement: cream base, lighter circulation notes, and restrained screen/arch accents
dark_closed_interior.note: Suppress dark/closed or overly ornate interpretation of Indochine.
dark_closed_interior.drawing_note: Tránh cảm giác tối/nặng: giữ nền kem sáng và chi tiết Đông Dương tiết chế.

soft_arch.material_note: Map descriptor to a simplified arch cue in facade/interior-equivalent notes.
soft_arch.drawing_note: Descriptor hint: vòm nhẹ là cảm hứng style, không phải đo đạc từ ảnh.

rattan_timber_screen.material_note: Map descriptor to restrained rattan/timber screen and warm accent notes.
rattan_timber_screen.drawing_note: Descriptor hint: mây/gỗ là hướng vật liệu concept để khách phản hồi.

cream_pattern_palette.material_note: Map descriptor to cream base, soft contrast, and a small pattern-tile accent zone.
cream_pattern_palette.drawing_note: Descriptor hint: tông kem/gạch bông là ghi chú palette concept, chưa chốt vật liệu.

validation_rules: apartment renovation should preserve fixed shafts unless verified otherwise

explanation_templates.style_summary: Hướng Indochine mềm phù hợp khi gia chủ thích cảm giác ấm, có chất Á Đông nhưng không quá nặng chi tiết.
explanation_templates.confirmation: Em đang đề xuất Indochine nhẹ: tông kem ấm, gỗ/mây tre và vài điểm nhấn vòm hoặc màn chắn mềm.
